title: Prove SkillSpec generated target fixtures against CLI routing

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to #965 equivalence proof over existing SkillSpec fixtures and startup CLI output; do not add new target adapters or broad test architecture.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add focused CLI equivalence tests that compare SkillSpec generated-target behavior fixtures with startup output for representative direct, lane, and fallback tasks.
canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py::test_generated_target_behavior_fixtures_match_startup_cli_routing -q', 'make test-workspace', 'make lint-workspace', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success', 'uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success', 'uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/contracts scripts/check tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py', 'make maintainer-surfaces', 'uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --verbose --format json', 'uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json', 'make schema-reference-docs']
canonical_core.completion_criteria: ['Representative direct, lane, and no-CLI fallback SkillSpec fixtures are compared against startup CLI output or fallback contract fields.', 'The test fails if generated-target fixture expectations drift from next_safe_action, skill routing, proof, completion-claim, or fallback output semantics.', '#965 can close as covered by semantic equivalence tests plus earlier generated skill/plugin projection tests.']
